text: 1. GREAT, unassailable must he the heavenly favour of' Three Gods, Varuna, Mitra, Aryaman. 2. O'er these, neither at home nor yet abroad or pathways that are Strange, The evil-minded foe hath power 3. Nor over him, the man on whom the Sons of Aditi bestow Eternal light that he may live.

metadata.title: Rig Veda - Mandala 10 Hymn 185
metadata.citation: Rig Veda, Mandala 10, Hymn 185; Ralph T. H. Griffith translation
